quotes.text: 你以为你毕业能进银行当行长？你只能去银行卖理财产品。
quotes.text_en: You think you'll become a bank president after graduation? You'll just be selling financial products at a bank.
quotes.context: 揭示金融专业毕业生的真实就业情况

quotes.text: 什么是好工作？钱多、事少、离家近、稳定。但你最多只能占两个。
quotes.text_en: What's a good job? Good pay, light work, close to home, stable. But you can only have two at most.
quotes.context: 理性分析好工作的标准

quotes.text: 考公考编，是当代年轻人最大的确定性。别嫌弃体制内，等你35岁被裁员就知道了。
quotes.text_en: Civil service exams are the greatest certainty for today's youth. Don't dismiss government jobs — you'll understand when you get laid off at 35.
quotes.context: 鼓励考公务员和事业编制

quotes.text: 你学了四年管理学，毕业去管谁？人家凭什么让你管？
quotes.text_en: You studied management for four years — who are you going to manage after graduation? Why would anyone let you manage them?
quotes.context: 批评管理学专业本科毕业生的就业尴尬

quotes.text: 互联网行业的高薪是用青春换的。你能拼到35岁，然后呢？
quotes.text_en: The high salaries in tech are traded for your youth. You can push yourself until 35, then what?
quotes.context: 分析互联网行业的年龄危机

quotes.text: 学技术的永远不会失业，因为社会永远需要能干活的人。
quotes.text_en: Those who learn practical skills will never be unemployed, because society always needs people who can do the work.
quotes.context: 强调技术类专业的就业保障

quotes.text: 第一份工作非常重要，它决定了你在哪个圈子、接触什么人、未来往哪个方向走。
quotes.text_en: Your first job is extremely important — it determines your circle, the people you meet, and the direction of your future.
quotes.context: 强调第一份工作对职业发展的奠基作用

quotes.text: 别光看平均薪资，你要看中位数。平均薪资是被马云拉上去的，跟你没关系。
quotes.text_en: Don't just look at average salaries — look at the median. Average salaries are pulled up by billionaires; it has nothing to do with you.
quotes.context: 揭示专业薪资数据的统计陷阱

quotes.text: 国企的好处不是工资高，是工资稳。你旱涝保收，过年有年终奖，退休有保障。
quotes.text_en: The advantage of state-owned enterprises isn't high pay — it's stable pay. Rain or shine you get paid, with year-end bonuses and retirement security.
quotes.context: 分析国企就业的核心优势

quotes.text: 私企给你画饼，国企给你发饼。你自己选。
quotes.text_en: Private companies paint you a pie (make empty promises); state-owned companies actually give you the pie. You choose.
quotes.context: 对比私企和国企的薪酬兑现

quotes.text: 自媒体不是职业，是副业。你见过几个自媒体做了十年还活得好的？
quotes.text_en: Social media isn't a career — it's a side hustle. How many content creators have you seen thriving after ten years?
quotes.context: 警告年轻人不要把自媒体当主业

quotes.text: 考研不是逃避就业的借口。你要想清楚，三年后就业环境会不会比现在更好？
quotes.text_en: Grad school isn't an excuse to avoid employment. Think clearly: will the job market be any better in three years?
quotes.context: 批评盲目考研的延迟就业行为

quotes.text: 毕业去大城市还是回小城市？有能力去大城市，没关系回小城市。就这么简单。
quotes.text_en: Go to a big city or return to a small town after graduation? If you're capable, go to the big city. If you have connections, go back to the small town. It's that simple.
quotes.context: 分析大城市和小城市的就业选择

quotes.text: 行业有周期，你得在上升期进去，别在下降期接盘。房地产、教培就是前车之鉴。
quotes.text_en: Industries have cycles. Get in during the upswing, don't be the one holding the bag on the decline. Real estate and tutoring are cautionary tales.
quotes.context: 分析行业周期对就业的影响

quotes.text: 女生就业确实比男生难，这是现实。所以女生更要选对专业，别让专业再给你加一道坎。
quotes.text_en: It's harder for women to find jobs — that's reality. So women need to choose the right major even more carefully; don't let your major add another hurdle.
quotes.context: 直面性别就业差距的现实

quotes.text: 起薪高不代表天花板高。有些行业起薪8000封顶一万，有些起薪5000但能到五万。看长远。
quotes.text_en: High starting salary doesn't mean a high ceiling. Some industries start at 8K but cap at 10K; others start at 5K but can reach 50K. Think long-term.
quotes.context: 分析起薪和职业天花板的关系

quotes.text: 海归也不值钱了。你花两百万出去留学，回来跟国内985抢同一个岗位，人家还嫌你不了解国内市场。
quotes.text_en: Overseas degrees aren't worth much anymore. You spend 2 million on studying abroad, come back competing with domestic 985 grads for the same job, and they say you don't understand the local market.
quotes.context: 分析海归学历贬值的现象

quotes.text: 好的大专比烂的本科强。你学个护理、学个数控，出来就能上手干活，企业抢着要。
quotes.text_en: A good vocational school beats a bad university. Learn nursing or CNC machining, and you can start working immediately — companies fight to hire you.
